command: Write-Output '=== CodeAnalyzer Discovery ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn' -Recurse -Filter '*CodeAnalyzer*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '=== Also checking Cloud-Controlled-Agent directory ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'code_analyzer|CodeAnalyzer|analyzer' } | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize
description: اكتشاف ملفات CodeAnalyzer على الجهاز المحلي
